title: AirAccount WeightConfig
description: Frontend schema for ALG_WEIGHTED (algId 0x07) configuration UI. Maps to AAStarAirAccountBase.WeightConfig on-chain struct.

weights.description: Per-source signature weights. Each value is uint8 (0–255). Stored on-chain as 7 × uint8 packed into one storage slot.

guardian2.description: Weight for guardian2 ECDSA signature (0 if slot unused)

tiers.description: Accumulated weight thresholds per spending tier. Must satisfy tier1 ≤ tier2 ≤ tier3. tier3 should equal max achievable weight.

tier1.description: Min weight for Tier 1 (small amounts, ~$0–$100 in guard)

tier3.description: Min weight for Tier 3 (large amounts, >$1000); equals max achievable

metadata.description: Optional UI display info, not stored on-chain.

presetName.description: Preset label shown in UI, e.g. 'Family 3-of-5', 'Personal High Security'

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the security model

totalMaxWeight.description: Computed: sum of all non-zero source weights. UI helper to show coverage.

examples.$comment: Personal: owner ECDSA=Tier1, owner P256=Tier2, ECDSA+P256 required for Tier3

metadata.description: Phone sign for small, Passkey required for medium, both for large.

examples.$comment: Family multisig: any 2-of-3 family members for Tier1, all 3 for Tier3

metadata.description: Any two family members can approve small/medium. All three needed for large transfers.

examples.$comment: High security: P256 + at least one guardian for any operation

metadata.description: Passkey + one guardian required even for small amounts. All + BLS DVT for large.

examples.$comment: DAO vote: BLS aggregate (DVT nodes) alone meets Tier1, guardian majority adds to Tier3

metadata.description: DVT BLS aggregate for routine ops. Guardian threshold for high-value.
